failure.error_msg: convolutional_encoder contains no child object named shift_reg

Encoded bit1 mismatch at cycle 1: got 0, expected 1 assert Logic('0') == 1 + where Logic('0') = LogicObject(convolutional_encoder.encoded_bit1).value + where LogicObject(convolutional_encoder.encoded_bit1) = HierarchyObject(convolutional_encoder).encoded_bit1

Encoded bit1 mismatch at cycle 2: got 0, expected 1 assert Logic('0') == 1 + where Logic('0') = LogicObject(convolutional_encoder.encoded_bit1).value + where LogicObject(convolutional_encoder.encoded_bit1) = HierarchyObject(convolutional_encoder).encoded_bit1
